category_sources: source_facts.description and official NumPy documentation call it the fundamental package for scientific computing with Python.
display_name_sources: Official documentation and project branding use NumPy; source_facts.name is numpy.
docs_sources: Official numpy.org documentation page provides User Guide, API reference, building from source, development, and release notes.
repo_sources: Official NumPy documentation lists GitHub as the Source Repository.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official documentation describe Python scientific computing, multidimensional arrays, routines, and linear algebra support.
